seo.title: Terms of Use | AInspiration
seo.description: Terms of Use - General terms of use for the ainspiration.eu website.

cgu.s1_body: These Terms of Use (ToU) govern access to and use of the website ainspiration.eu, published by Distr'Action SPRL. By accessing the site, you unreservedly accept these Terms of Use.
cgu.s2_body: The site is freely accessible to any user with internet access. The costs of accessing and using the telecommunications network are borne by the user. Distr'Action SPRL reserves the right to suspend or interrupt access to the site for maintenance or updates, without prior notice or compensation.
cgu.s3_body: All content on the site (text, images, logos, videos, graphics, icons, software) is protected by intellectual property law and remains the exclusive property of Distr'Action SPRL or its partners. Any reproduction, representation, modification or exploitation, even partial, without prior written authorisation, is strictly prohibited.
cgu.s4_intro: Users agree to use the site in accordance with its intended purpose and applicable laws. In particular, it is prohibited to:
cgu.s4_li1: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to the site's systems
cgu.s4_li2: Use the site for unlawful or fraudulent purposes
cgu.s4_li4: Collect personal data of other users
cgu.s5_body: The site offers an AI-powered chatbot. The responses provided by the chatbot are for informational purposes only and do not constitute legal advice, financial advice, or any contractual commitment. Distr'Action SPRL shall not be held liable for decisions made on the basis of information provided by the chatbot.
cgu.s6_body: Personal data collected via the site's forms is processed in accordance with the GDPR. For more information, please consult our
cgu.s7_body: The site uses cookies essential to its operation and, with your consent, analytics cookies. You may manage your preferences via the cookie banner displayed on your first visit.
cgu.s8_body: The site may contain links to third-party websites. Distr'Action SPRL does not control the content of these sites and shall not be held liable for their content or their data protection practices.
cgu.s9_body: Distr'Action SPRL endeavours to provide accurate and up-to-date information, but does not guarantee the completeness or accuracy of the content. Use of the site is at the user's own risk. Distr'Action SPRL shall not be held liable for any indirect damage resulting from the use of the site.
cgu.s10_title: 10. Amendment of the Terms of Use
cgu.s10_body: Distr'Action SPRL reserves the right to amend these Terms of Use at any time. Amendments take effect upon publication on the site. Continued use of the site after amendment constitutes acceptance of the new Terms of Use.
cgu.s11_body: These Terms of Use are governed by Belgian law. Any dispute relating to the use of the site falls under the jurisdiction of the courts of the district of Distr'Action SPRL's registered office.

seo.title: General Terms and Conditions of Sale | AInspiration
seo.description: General Terms and Conditions of Sale for AInspiration services by Distr'Action SPRL.

cgv.pageTitle: General Terms and Conditions of Sale
cgv.s1_body: These General Terms and Conditions of Sale (GTCS) govern the services offered by Distr'Action SPRL, trading under the AInspiration® brand, to its professional and individual clients.
cgv.s2_li3: Training in the use of AI tools
cgv.s2_li4: Personalised support and AI solution integration
cgv.s3_body1: The free AI audit is an intellectual service provided without financial consideration and without any commitment on the part of the client. The audit report delivered contains recommendations of a purely informational and indicative nature. These recommendations do not constitute a guarantee of results, legal advice, tax advice, or financial advice.
cgv.s3_body2: Data communicated by the client as part of the audit is processed in accordance with our privacy policy and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). It is used exclusively for the purpose of carrying out the audit and is not transmitted to third parties.
cgv.s3_body3: Distr'Action SPRL shall not be held liable for the recommendations made in the audit report, nor for any decisions taken by the client on the basis of those recommendations. The client remains solely responsible for implementing any suggested actions.
cgv.s4_body: Prices are quoted in euros (EUR), excluding VAT unless otherwise stated. A detailed quotation is provided before any paid service. The initial audit is free of charge and without obligation.
cgv.s5_body: Any order implies acceptance of these GTCS. The order is confirmed by signature of the quotation or online validation, and payment of any deposit.
cgv.s6_body: Invoices are payable within 30 days of the invoice date, unless otherwise agreed. In the event of late payment, a late interest rate of 10% per annum and a fixed indemnity of €40 shall apply.
cgv.s7_body: In accordance with the Belgian Code of Economic Law, the consumer client has a right of withdrawal of 14 calendar days from the conclusion of the contract, unless the service has commenced with their express agreement.
cgv.s8_body: AInspiration undertakes to provide its services with diligence and professionalism (best-efforts obligation). The liability of Distr'Action SPRL is limited to the amounts paid by the client for the service in question.
cgv.s9_body: The parties undertake to keep confidential all information exchanged in the course of the service. This obligation survives the termination of the contract.
cgv.s10_body: These GTCS are governed by Belgian law. Any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of the courts of the district of Distr'Action SPRL's registered office.

mentions.s5_body: Personal data collected on this site is processed in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). For more information, please consult our

seo.title: Privacy Policy | AInspiration
seo.description: Privacy policy and personal data protection - AInspiration.

privacy.s1_body: We attach the utmost importance to the protection of your personal data. This policy details how we collect, use and protect your information.
privacy.s3_title: Data Collected During the AI Audit
privacy.s3_intro: As part of the free AI audit, we collect the following data:
privacy.s3_li2: Description of your business and business processes
privacy.s3_li3: Information on your existing tools and systems
privacy.s3_body: This data is used exclusively to carry out your personalised audit and is not transmitted to third parties. It is retained for a maximum period of 12 months from the date of the audit, unless you request its deletion. The audit report contains recommendations of an informational nature only.
privacy.s4_intro: We use different types of cookies:
privacy.s4_essential: Necessary for the operation of the site
privacy.s4_analytics: To understand how the site is used
privacy.s5_intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.s5_li1: Right of access to your data
privacy.s6_body: For any questions regarding your personal data, please contact our DPO:
privacy.s6_address: Rue de la Loi 227, 1040 Brussels, Belgium
